title: Displaying Dates in Moday.com using ISO 8601 format and general consistency a functional deficiency
excerpt:
In Monday.com user preferences I can select my date to display as January 1,2025 or 1 January, 2025. Neither of these are ISO 8601 formats.  ISO = 2025-01-01 (YYYY-MM-DD) 
And the column view options do not even match th…

posts.author: Steve_S (Steve Schertler)
posts.cookedHtml:
In Monday.com user preferences I can select my date to display as January 1,2025 or 1 January, 2025. Neither of these are ISO 8601 formats. ISO = 2025-01-01 (YYYY-MM-DD)

And the column view options do not even match the user preference options which are different still.

I see that these & similar comments have been made since the year 2020.

That is five years ago. How can such a foundational data point for a workforce/project management tool not be corrected?

This is not an enhancement request this is a functional deficiency in the platform itself.
